title: User
description: Gruper Distributed user identity record. Each user has a root ed25519 keypair that cryptographically anchors their agents and share tokens.

pubkey.description: Base64url-encoded ed25519 public key. Identity anchor for all agents and tokens created by this user.

display_name.description: Human-readable display name shown in the Manager Console and audit log.

org_id.description: Optional organization affiliation. Reserved for multi-org support in gd-1.x.

recovery_method.description: Optional key recovery mechanism. Null = keypair-only (no recovery if key lost).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of account creation.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata for future extensibility.
